tweets.text:
Another really cool and unique thing about @prism_lp I rarely see in these onchain new launches, is an instantaneous creation of really talented comunity of OG’s getting together and building stuff and helping out @0xsolazy, the bery talented lead dev. Recognizing the potential we are exposed to: the birth of a new DeFi primitive during the darkest hour of DeFi. 

One that adresses two core problems: reducing the attack surface and failure model substantially. And offering something that is normie friendly and outward facing - Indexes - and not just a solution to problems that never existed in the first place. All while delivering and increasingly rare and very elegant incentive alignment and value accrual model to the token. No more fucking “trust me bro” coins. Events of the last couple of days should have pointed you in the right direction already.

Everyone is helping on their respective areas of expertise, more will join, and @ColbySaysHi has been the champ in this so far: take a look here https://t.co/1K6BpDW0MS if you wanna start exploring the ecosystem. 

The website itself gives you a snapshot of the vibes: start with the 90’s disco or LoFi beats with the embedded radio, visuals on point for that dopamine kick, intuitive and well formatted sharing/social elements and more importantly all relevant informations clearly available at a glance. It’s only been a week, and this community website is already a better “business card” than most blockbuster projects out there.

It’s always in the small things. Keep pushing guys 🫡
tweets.full_text:
Another really cool and unique thing about @prism_lp I rarely see in these onchain new launches, is an instantaneous creation of really talented comunity of OG’s getting together and building stuff and helping out @0xsolazy, the bery talented lead dev. Recognizing the potential we are exposed to: the birth of a new DeFi primitive during the darkest hour of DeFi. 

One that adresses two core problems: reducing the attack surface and failure model substantially. And offering something that is normie friendly and outward facing - Indexes - and not just a solution to problems that never existed in the first place. All while delivering and increasingly rare and very elegant incentive alignment and value accrual model to the token. No more fucking “trust me bro” coins. Events of the last couple of days should have pointed you in the right direction already.

Everyone is helping on their respective areas of expertise, more will join, and @ColbySaysHi has been the champ in this so far: take a look here https://t.co/1K6BpDW0MS if you wanna start exploring the ecosystem. 

The website itself gives you a snapshot of the vibes: start with the 90’s disco or LoFi beats with the embedded radio, visuals on point for that dopamine kick, intuitive and well formatted sharing/social elements and more importantly all relevant informations clearly available at a glance. It’s only been a week, and this community website is already a better “business card” than most blockbuster projects out there.

It’s always in the small things. Keep pushing guys 🫡

- rip a best ball draft while the baby naps

- rip a game of league solo q while the baby naps. My mood now depends on if I win or lose this game
- listen to a new album with the baby
- make dinner
- check the charts, update my mood based on prices
- get baby to bed
- rip a dab and indiscriminately buy vintage Pokemon cards until I pass out
tweets.quoted_tweet_text:
My current lifemaxxing stack:

- 4:30am wake up
- Read classic books
- 3 hours creative work before 8am
- Lift/run 6x/week
- Eat single ingredient foods
- Present time with fam/friends
- 20-min evening sauna
- Wild Roman skincare routine
- 8:30pm bedtime

Wouldn't change a thing.

thread_tweets.text:
Think low multiples on Chinese co's have more to do with rampant fraud than anything else.  And Jack spoke poorly about Xi in China, which is not a free country.

I think that if you look at AI as a matter of national defense (which it is viewed as in DC), then we can't stop AI spend until we win.  Which is why there's an implicit govt backstop atm.  They now make it explicit so that the US govt can experience some of the upside for the downside protection they're obviously providing.

tweets.text: Bitcoin Maximalist: Bitcoin is the dominant digital monetary network: an ethical, technical, and economic breakthrough, and an instrument of economic empowerment. It offers superior property rights, monetary integrity, and hope to those facing economic misery.

thread_tweets.text: Bitcoin Maximalist: Bitcoin is the dominant digital monetary network: an ethical, technical, and economic breakthrough, and an instrument of economic empowerment. It offers superior property rights, monetary integrity, and hope to those facing economic misery.
thread_tweets.full_text: Bitcoin Maximalist: Bitcoin is the dominant digital monetary network: an ethical, technical, and economic breakthrough, and an instrument of economic empowerment. It offers superior property rights, monetary integrity, and hope to those facing economic misery.

thread_tweets.text: Bitcoin Capitalist: Bitcoin reaches its full potential by integrating with the global economy: currencies, credit, securities, companies, banks, institutions, governments, families, and individuals. Bitcoin is an open monetary network for everyone.
thread_tweets.full_text: Bitcoin Capitalist: Bitcoin reaches its full potential by integrating with the global economy: currencies, credit, securities, companies, banks, institutions, governments, families, and individuals. Bitcoin is an open monetary network for everyone.

thread_tweets.text: Bitcoin Technologist: Bitcoin reaches its full potential through continuous base-layer improvement that enhances scalability, usability, privacy, functionality, security, integrity, and compatibility as needs and threats evolve.
thread_tweets.full_text: Bitcoin Technologist: Bitcoin reaches its full potential through continuous base-layer improvement that enhances scalability, usability, privacy, functionality, security, integrity, and compatibility as needs and threats evolve.

thread_tweets.text: Bitcoin Fundamentalist: Bitcoin reaches its full potential by remaining true to its core principles: self-custody, personal nodes, decentralization, immutability, and use as money. Fundamentalists seek to protect Bitcoin from corruption, capture, or compromise.
thread_tweets.full_text: Bitcoin Fundamentalist: Bitcoin reaches its full potential by remaining true to its core principles: self-custody, personal nodes, decentralization, immutability, and use as money. Fundamentalists seek to protect Bitcoin from corruption, capture, or compromise.

tweets.full_text:
Bitcoin Maximalist: Bitcoin is the dominant digital monetary network: an ethical, technical, and economic breakthrough, and an instrument of economic empowerment. It offers superior property rights, monetary integrity, and hope to those facing economic misery.

Bitcoin Capitalist: Bitcoin reaches its full potential by integrating with the global economy: currencies, credit, securities, companies, banks, institutions, governments, families, and individuals. Bitcoin is an open monetary network for everyone.

Bitcoin Technologist: Bitcoin reaches its full potential through continuous base-layer improvement that enhances scalability, usability, privacy, functionality, security, integrity, and compatibility as needs and threats evolve.

Bitcoin Fundamentalist: Bitcoin reaches its full potential by remaining true to its core principles: self-custody, personal nodes, decentralization, immutability, and use as money. Fundamentalists seek to protect Bitcoin from corruption, capture, or compromise.
